历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 17778→18191→21957→26224→24815, showing an overall backward trend. In 2023–2024, it significantly shifted backward for two consecutive years, with a slight recovery to 24815 in 2025. Over the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 7000 places. The enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Province for Physics Category: 84 in 2021, 84 in 2022, 81 in 2023, 83 in 2024, 82 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 72, a reduction of about 12.2% compared to 2025, narrowing the competitive pool.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen in recent years (78th in 2021→74th in 2026), placing it at an upper-middle level among national universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly due to sports honors such as the men's volleyball championship boosting the university's exposure. Douyin popularity ranks 43rd (relatively hot), with moderate to high attention on short video platforms. Historical abnormal admission records show a low-attention signal in 2023, but no sustained negative public opinion. Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (top in the country), directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering major in Physics Category. Clinical Medicine, Materials Science and Engineering, and other disciplines are relatively strong, attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and other main Physics Category majors continue to be highly recommended with high social attention. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Liaoning Province is about 200,000, roughly the same as in 2025, with an estimated 143,600 Physics Category examinees, providing a stable competitive base. Nanchang University is located in Jiangxi Province, with no significant regional preference advantage in Liaoning Province. The university's enrollment proportion in Liaoning is about 2.5%–3.5%, which is a normal scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend in rankings, the 12.2% reduction in Physics Category enrollment in 2026 (which pushes rankings forward), the slightly positive university reputation and relatively hot Douyin popularity (attracting more attention), and the basically unchanged total number of examinees, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 23030, with a range of 22530–23530.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 23030, range 22530–23530. If your ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 22530), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 23530), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors and use Tier 3 majors as a safe backup.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及历年位次趋势修正，预测2026年南昌大学医学类最低录取位次约为5487名，波动区间预计在5187至5787名之间。与2025年的7269名相比，位次数字显 著下降（更易进），主要受医学类大幅缩招45.5%及护理学移出医学批次的综合影响。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In the separate admission batch for medical subjects in Liaoning Province, Nanchang University's minimum admission rank was 5252 (plan 14) in 2022, 5363 (plan 12) in 2023, 5852 (plan 11) in 2024, and 7269 (plan 11) in 2025. Over four years, the rank has continuously increased (number larger), rising from 5252 to 7269, a cumulative increase of 2017 places, reflecting intensifying competition for medical admissions year by year. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan is significantly reduced to 6 students (Clinical Medicine 4, Preventive Medicine 2), a decrease of 5 from 2025's 11, a reduction of 45.5%; meanwhile, Nursing has been moved out of the medical category into the history category, leaving only Clinical Medicine and Preventive Medicine in the medical category. The substantial reduction in enrollment has a significant impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University, located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province, is a key national university under the 211 Project and a national Double First-Class construction university, ranking among the top in the country in comprehensive strength. Its medical disciplines have a long history, and the Clinical Medicine program enjoys high reputation and recognition in the region, attracting certain interest from Liaoning candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs has been consistently high, with Clinical Medicine as the core specialty facing particularly intense competition. Nanchang University's medical category has a small enrollment scale in Liaoning Province (only 6 in 2026), and the scarcity further increases competition. Although the university is located in Jiangxi rather than the Northeast region, its 211 platform and medical program advantages still attract Liaoning candidates to apply across provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and historical rank trend correction, the predicted minimum admission rank for Nanchang University's medical category in 2026 is approximately 5487, with a fluctuation range expected between 5187 and 5787. Compared to 2025's 7269, the rank number significantly decreases (easier to enter), mainly due to the combined impact of a 45.5% reduction in medical enrollment and the removal of Nursing from the medical batch.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
(In 2026, the medical category only includes the above two programs; Nursing has been moved to the history category)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your rank falls within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Preventive Medicine as the main target, with Clinical Medicine as a reach goal. Since the medical category in 2026 only enrolls 6 students and lacks traditional safety programs, candidates should also pay attention to admission opportunities for Nursing in the history category.
